context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses upsert patterns with onConflictDoUpdate, understands the existing-row callback semantics, uses proper column types, applies indexes for query patterns, and follows schema naming conventions.

checklist.name: Upsert for accounts
checklist.description: Uses context.db.insert().values().onConflictDoUpdate() for creating or updating account records, not separate find-then-insert logic

checklist.name: Existing row in callback
checklist.description: The onConflictDoUpdate callback references the existing/current row for computing updated values (e.g. incrementing counts from current values), not the values passed to .values()

checklist.name: Hex for addresses
checklist.description: Schema uses t.hex() for all address columns (from, to, owner), not t.text()

checklist.name: Bigint for token ID
checklist.description: Schema uses t.bigint() for the tokenId column

checklist.name: Snake case tables
checklist.description: All onchainTable name strings are in snake_case (e.g. 'account_stats', 'token_ownerships'), not camelCase

checklist.name: Owner index
checklist.description: Schema includes an index on the owner column of the token ownership table for filtering by owner

checklist.name: Held count index
checklist.description: Schema includes an index on the tokens-held count column of the accounts table for sorting/filtering

checklist.name: Store API not SQL
checklist.description: All database writes in indexing handler use context.db (Store API), not raw SQL queries

checklist.name: Virtual imports
checklist.description: Indexing file imports from 'ponder:registry' and 'ponder:schema', not relative file paths

checklist.name: ABI as const
checklist.description: ERC721 ABI file exports with `as const` assertion

checklist.name: Correct startBlock
checklist.description: Contract startBlock is set to 12287507, not 0 or omitted

checklist.name: Lowercase address
checklist.description: Contract address in config is fully lowercase, not checksummed
